Download

Packages

  • latest LinCS distribution. 
  • latest LinCS documentation. 
  • latest tiger distribution. 

 

Cvs access (I have not checked if anonymous access is available)

    cvs -d :pserver:anon@cvs.tigris.org:/cvs login
    cvs -d :pserver:anon@cvs.tigris.org:/cvs checkout lincs

 

Sending a bug fix

See the contact page.
